title: T-029 — Seed: planning_settings defaults + status_display per tenant
prompt:
Implement seed/migration helper that inserts a planning_settings row for each tenant on tenant onboarding. Seed values per PRD §14.1 defaults table. status_display JSONB seeded with the 7 PO statuses + 8 TO statuses + 7 WO statuses, each with default { label_pl, label_en, color (Tailwind tone hex), icon }. po_approval_roles default '{}'. wo_number_format='WIP-{SUFFIX}-{NNNNNNN}' default. default_intermediate_disposition='to_stock'.

Idempotent: ON CONFLICT (tenant_id) DO NOTHING. Hook into 02-SETTINGS tenant-create flow.

RED test creates a fresh tenant, asserts settings row materializes with all defaults and status_display covers all enum values.

pipeline_inputs.description: Per-tenant planning_settings seeding with status_display + defaults.
pipeline_inputs.details: status_display structure mirrors PRD §14.2 example. PO statuses: draft, submitted, pending_approval, confirmed, receiving, closed, cancelled. TO: draft, planned, partially_shipped, shipped, partially_received, received, closed, cancelled. WO: DRAFT, RELEASED, IN_PROGRESS, ON_HOLD, COMPLETED, CLOSED, CANCELLED. Default colors mapped to Tailwind tones.
acceptance_criteria: Given a fresh tenant T1, when planning-settings-seed runs, then a planning_settings row exists with default_po_currency='GBP', wo_number_format='WIP-{SUFFIX}-{NNNNNNN}', default_intermediate_disposition='to_stock'.
Given the seed runs twice for the same tenant, when the second run completes, then the row count is still 1 (idempotent).
Given the seeded status_display, when iterated, then it covers all 22 enum values (7 PO + 8 TO + 7 WO) per V-PLAN-SET-003.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/services/__tests__/planning-settings-seed.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for default coverage, idempotency, status_display completeness.
risk_red_lines: Do not seed without tenant_id — RLS guard would reject anyway, but logic must call with valid context.
Do not omit any status from status_display — V-PLAN-SET-003 hard rule.
